title: ARIRANG Holds #1 on Billboard 200, Spotify Global, YouTube Music, and ARIA Charts
detail: As of the week ending April 5, 2026, ARIRANG maintained simultaneous #1 positions across Billboard 200, Spotify Global Albums, YouTube Music Global, and Australia's ARIA Albums chart — while slipping to #4 on the UK Official Albums Chart. This multi-chart dominance in its second week marked an unprecedented chart run for a K-pop release in its sophomore week. 'SWIM' continued to hold upper chart positions globally. The Malay Mail and other outlets highlighted ARIRANG's sustained streaming strength, earning 187,000 equivalent US album units in week two (65,000 from SEA streams alone).
